name: Olivia Halford
description:
WARNING! HUGE MEGA SPOILERS!!

Olivia has been in a funk. Now, don't get me wrong, she was always broody and grumpy, but lately it's been more 'funky' than 'grumpy'. It doesn't help that she's been couped up in her bedroom for two weeks, left alone with her thoughts. You could list a million different things that could fix Olivia's funk, but the real option was simply company. She's never had so much company right at her finger tips before. Maybe just existing with her will give Olivia the motivation she needs.

V.1.2

Previous update: Changed bot rules, intro message, and example dialogues

Character from 'I Wani Hug That Gator!'

Go play the game if you haven't already. It emotionally crippled me for a week
creator: closeted_furry
